omitted_declarations.policy_reference: 3) If you participate in a lucky draw or similar advertising promotion, your information (name, phone number (including mobile phone number), and address) will be provided to courier service providers, such as SF Express, YTO Express and DHL (as indicated on the website), or the relevant suppliers to the extent necessary for Buyer App or prizes and goods suppliers to deliver the relevant prizes and goods to you.
